Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Wiht A Properly Served Depsoition Subpeona For Production Of Deposition Subpeona For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE PAYROLL RESOURCE GROUP'S MOTION TO COMPEL S.E. SCHER CORPORATION WITH A PROPERLY SERVED DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS, TO STRIKE THE OBJECTIONS OF DEFENDANT TO SAID SUBPOENA AND TO AWARD PLAINTIFF ITS COSTS AND EXPENSES INCURRED IN BRINGING THIS MOTION.
Appearances: Michael A. Mazzocone (399.0800) for plaintiff and moving party; Jeffrey J. Mann of Huddleston & Sipos Law Group LLP (925.947.0200) for defendants and responding parties.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied and all requests for sanctions denied. Mr. Sipos represents that S.E. Scher Corporation completed an Evidence Code 1560 (presumably intended to be 1561) affidavit stating that it had searched its records and has no responsive documents. No further response or production is required. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Motion To Compel The American Conservatory Theatre Foundation To Comply With A Properly Served Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records, To Strike The Objections Of Deft Payroll Systems To Said Subpoena And To Award Pltf Its Costs And Expenses Incurred In Bringing This Motion
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE PAYROLL RESOURCE GROUP'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE AMERICAN CONSERVATORY THEATRE FOUNDATION TO COMPLY WITH A PROPERLY SERVED DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS, TO STRIKE THE OBJECTIONS OF DEFENDANT TO SAID SUBPOENA AND TO AWARD PLAINTIFF ITS COSTS AND EXPENSES INCURRED IN BRINGING THIS MOTION.
Appearances: Michael A. Mazzocone (399.0800) for plaintiff and moving party; Jeffrey J. Mann of Huddleston & Sipos Law Group LLP (925.947.0200) for defendants and responding parties.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted in part and all requests for sanctions denied. All emails from October 1, 2010 through and including August 8, 2011 that are responsive to requests 1 and 2 must be produced no later than December 30, 2011 with an Evidence Code 1561 affidavit except that any documents claimed by the subpoenaed deponent and/or the defendants to contain trade secret information and/or attorney-client communications may be redacted or withheld. If any documents are redacted or withheld because they are asserted to contain trade secret information and/or are attorney-client communications, the subpoenaed deponent must provide a privilege log as to those documents. All objections other than trade secrets and attorney-client privilege lack merit. Neither side's position lacked substantial justification. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
